function:app/src/components/intelligence/svgForceLayout.worker.ts:forceSimulation<WNode, WLink>(nodes)
    .force('charge', forceManyBody<WNode>().strength(-140).distanceMax(420))
    .force(

      forceLink<WNode, WLink>(links)
        .id((_d, i) => i)
        .distance(58)
        .strength(0.35)
    )

    .force(
      'collide',
      forceCollide<WNode>().radius(d => d.r + 2)
    )
    .stop
